title: UPSC CDS II 2026 Notification Out
description: Union Public Service Commission has released Combined Defence Services Examination II 2026 notification. Eligible candidates can apply online from 20 March 2026 to 9 April 2026.

title: SSC GD Constable Result 2026 Declared
description: Staff Selection Commission released GD Constable 2026 result. Candidates can check scorecard and cutoff marks on official portal.

title: RRB NTPC CBT 1 Admit Card 2026 Available
description: Railway Recruitment Board activated NTPC CBT 1 admit card download link for all zones. Exam starts from 5 April 2026.
